010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
024
025/**
026 * Represents a JSON:API Relationship Object as defined by
027 * <a href="https://jsonapi.org/format/#document-resource-object-relationships">JSON:API v1.1 &#167; Relationships</a>.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * A relationship carries:
031 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
032 *   <li>{@code data} - resource linkage. Per spec, this can be {@code null}, a single
033 *     {@link JsonApiResourceIdentifier}, or a JSON array of identifiers. Modeled here as {@code Object}.
034 *   <li>{@code links} - related URLs. Each value can be either a JSON string URL or a {@link JsonApiLink} object;
035 *     the field-level {@link JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap} swap handles the union.
036 *   <li>{@code meta} - free-form meta bag.
037 * </ul>
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
040 *   <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanJsonApi">juneau-bean-jsonapi</a>
041 * </ul>
042 */
043@Marshalled
044public class JsonApiRelationship {
045
046   private Object data;
047   private Map<String,Object> links;
048   private Map<String,Object> meta;
049
050   /**
051    * Default constructor.
052    */
053   public JsonApiRelationship() { /* intentionally empty */ }
054
055   /**
056    * Bean property getter:  <property>data</property>.
057    *
058    * <p>
059    * Resource linkage. Per spec, this may be {@code null}, a single {@link JsonApiResourceIdentifier}, or a
060    * {@code List&lt;JsonApiResourceIdentifier&gt;}.
061    *
062    * @return The value of the <property>data</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
063    */
064   public Object getData() { return data; }
065
066   /**
067    * Bean property setter:  <property>data</property>.
068    *
069    * @param value The new value (single identifier, list of identifiers, or {@code null} to unset).
070    * @return This object.
071    */
072   public JsonApiRelationship setData(Object value) {
073      data = value;
074      return this;
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Typed setter for single-identifier linkage.
079    *
080    * @param value The identifier.
081    * @return This object.
082    */
083   public JsonApiRelationship setData(JsonApiResourceIdentifier value) {
084      data = value;
085      return this;
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Typed setter for to-many linkage.
090    *
091    * @param value The list of identifiers.
092    * @return This object.
093    */
094   public JsonApiRelationship setData(List<JsonApiResourceIdentifier> value) {
095      data = value;
096      return this;
097   }
098
099   /**
100    * Bean property getter:  <property>links</property>.
101    *
102    * <p>
103    * Per spec, each {@code links} value can be either a JSON string URL or a {@link JsonApiLink} object.
104    *
105    * @return The value of the <property>links</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
106    */
107   @BeanProp(value="links")
108   @Swap(JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap.class)
109   public Map<String,Object> getLinks() { return links; }
110
111   /**
112    * Bean property setter:  <property>links</property>.
113    *
114    * @param value The new value for this property.
115    * @return This object.
116    */
117   @BeanProp(value="links")
118   @Swap(JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap.class)
119   public JsonApiRelationship setLinks(Map<String,Object> value) {
120      links = value;
121      return this;
122   }
123
124   /**
125    * Bean property getter:  <property>meta</property>.
126    *
127    * @return The value of the <property>meta</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
128    */
129   public Map<String,Object> getMeta() { return meta; }
130
131   /**
132    * Bean property setter:  <property>meta</property>.
133    *
134    * @param value The new value for this property.
135    * @return This object.
136    */
137   public JsonApiRelationship setMeta(Map<String,Object> value) {
138      meta = value;
139      return this;
140   }
141
142   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
143   public String toString() {
144      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
145   }
146}
